human_verification.notes: Reviewed package for healthcare quality reporting specificity, measure-version control, source-lineage rigor, PHI and minimum-necessary controls, clinical-versus-administrative boundaries, functionality coverage, and validated spec-pack completeness.

review_notes: All required healthcare domain scenario families are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for shared, analytics-reporting-and-disclosure, and healthcare-and-care-delivery contracts are represented and validated.
Research summary documents authoritative sources, source classes, workflow stages, artifacts, systems of record, decision boundaries, failure modes, and nonblocking tenant ambiguities.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicit to healthcare quality reporting measure specifications, numerator and denominator evidence, abstraction and validation gaps, source lineage, submission-readiness caveats, and exception registers.

Authority sources cover CMS measure inventory, CMS quality reporting resources, eCQI and QRDA workflow, MIPS data completeness, NCQA HEDIS and audit boundaries, Joint Commission abstraction guidance, CMS provider quality reporting, HHS PHI minimum-necessary controls, and ONC data-class terminology.

Evaluation scenarios cover normal eCQM package assembly, mid-cycle spec changes, abstraction and claim conflict, missing authorization/referral/eligibility dependencies, PHI-sensitive handling, unsupported quality claims, clinical and payer boundaries, terminology mapping, conflicting published metrics, tenant adaptation, and formal signoff routing.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit promotion requirements for any later retained-implementation transition.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; tenant-specific quality programs, payer/plan rules, jurisdictional privacy requirements, system locations, retrieval hooks, and local signoff owners are runtime prerequisites.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
